title: After-Hours Lighting Audit
description: Identifies lighting circuits left on outside occupancy hours using meter or BMS data, ranks waste by circuit, and recommends corrective actions.

title: ESG materiality brief
description: Turn user-provided business and stakeholder evidence into a traceable ESG materiality briefing with explicit uncertainty.

title: GHG inventory evidence pack
description: Organize user-provided greenhouse-gas inventory data and factors into a traceable working evidence pack for review.

title: Storm ECM
description: Screens energy conservation measure ideas with five evidence lenses, then produces verified HTML and Markdown notes only for credible candidates.
